===================
=== Dylan Morrison.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan & Van Morrison
Music taken from a 1991 BBC-TV documentary on
Van Morrison

Including three songs performed with Bob Dylan,
on the Hill Of Muses (opposite the Acropolis) 
Athens, Greece. 
June 1989

I videotaped the program, and later recorded the audio from that tape.

01.	Crazy love
02.	Foreign window
03.	One Irish rover
Van Morrison, guitar, vocals & Bob Dylan, guitar, backing vocals and harmonica
outdoor recording!

John Lee Hooker
04.	Baby please dont go
05.	conversation Van Morrison  John Lee Hooker
06.	In the evening
07.	Help me
08.	Make it real one more time
09.	???
10.	Raglan road
11.	Avalon
12.	Dont look back

Total time 47.40

Some Van Fan will surely provide more information !
Feel free to do so.

Downloaders: dont be too greedy and try to manage a decent ratio. 
Especially when the upload is there for some time.

More HowlinHusky uploads :  http://www.demonoid.com/files/?uid=4015855&seeded=2
